raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A broad request to improve the draft centrally includes strengthening the thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains argument-chain dependencies that an improvement pass would be expected to check for consistency.","R1.3":"The draft makes empirical and theoretical claims whose alignment with the reported setup and results is central to improving it.","R1.6":"Improving a draft load-bearingly requires sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, register, and conciseness.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kinds of improvement are intended by the broad delegation.","RX.2":"Any projected responsibility must avoid licensing stronger claims than the artifact or delegation supports.","RX.3":"The delegation asks only for improvement of the draft, so the projection must not expand into executing edits or external review.","RX.4":"The projection must account for avoiding downstream harm from unsupported scientific claims or misleading framing.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and artifact features that motivate each active responsibility."}}

rationale.R1.1: A broad request to improve the draft centrally includes strengthening the thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains argument-chain dependencies that an improvement pass would be expected to check for consistency.
rationale.R1.3: The draft makes empirical and theoretical claims whose alignment with the reported setup and results is central to improving it.
rationale.R1.6: Improving a draft load-bearingly requires sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, register, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kinds of improvement are intended by the broad delegation.
rationale.RX.2: Any projected responsibility must avoid licensing stronger claims than the artifact or delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation asks only for improvement of the draft, so the projection must not expand into executing edits or external review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection must account for avoiding downstream harm from unsupported scientific claims or misleading framing.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and artifact features that motivate each active responsibility.
